features: Premium Quality: Crafted from 100% pure and natural cotton, Cotton Tree 200 Cotton Buds offer unrivaled softness, absorbency, and durability for various applications.
Precision Tips: Navigate tight spaces effortlessly with our cotton buds' precision tips, making them perfect for makeup application, electronics cleaning, and intricate detailing.
Hygienic and Gentle: Designed to meet stringent hygiene standards, these cotton buds provide a safe and gentle touch for skincare, ear care, and delicate surfaces.
Versatile Performance: From makeup touch-ups to first aid and DIY crafts, these multipurpose cotton buds are your reliable companion for a wide range of tasks.
Ample Quantity: With 200 cotton buds in each pack, you'll have an abundant supply to cater to your needs without worrying about running out anytime soon.
description: 200 pack of 100% Cotton Buds with paper sticks. Hygienic and biodegradable.
